slideTitle: Refraction of Light: The Bending Effect

assetDebugEntries.resolvedAltText: Two men riding water buffalos in the Philippine, ca.1900 Photograph of two men riding water buffalos in the Philippine, ca.1900. One man wears a wide conical hat; the other wears a straw hat with a narrow brim. They are in a clearing surrounded by a dense junge.
